rationale: Initial Discovery pass: enumerated 2 target-defining proper nouns (MLB, GitHub Pages), 11 assumptions, 8 inflection points (2 high / 5 medium / 1 low), 7 first-contact requirements, 15 OOS items. Static-hosting constraint drives client-side fetch from statsapi.mlb.com as default data path.

TD-initial: 6 sections (data-client, trends-engine, rankings-engine, ui-shell, ui-render, edge-case-testing). 11 IP resolutions (8 Discovery IPs + 3 TD-introduced: TD-IP-A no-chart-lib, TD-IP-B ES modules, TD-IP-C vanilla CSS). CORS probe resolved via canonical_evidence — client-side fetch from github.io confirmed viable. Chose PNV verb: show a daily dashboard of MLB teams covering weekly trends, upcoming games, and overall rankings. 30 acceptance assertions + 1 PNV + 41 discovery_coverage_assertions. 6 interface contracts written.

Editor review-v1: verdict pass_with_recommendations. Six structural checks performed (proper_noun_citation, discovery_high_importance_action, td_ip_source, first_contact_coverage, telos_coherence, schema_compliance). 2 low-severity findings recorded as Critic post-build verification items, no routing back to Discovery or TD: F.1 both proper nouns pending but pragmatically honored by statsapi.mlb.com data path + inherited Pages deployment_target; F.2 IP2 CORS resolution carries community-evidence sub-block with explicit snapshot-builder fallback if live-load fails. All 7 FCs covered. Telos coherence intact across all 6 sections. Schema v1.7/v1.9 compliance confirmed. Next role: Coordinator.

DAG built with 7 nodes across 5 waves: wave 1 [data-client, ui-shell] parallel, wave 2 [trends-engine, rankings-engine] parallel, wave 3 [ui-render], wave 4 [integrator pseudo], wave 5 [edge-case-testing]. Dispatch mode: inline (6 sections <= 8).
Plan: ship one Builder producing data-client.js + teams.js sidecar (30-team color fallback). Five exports cover the four contracts plus fetchRecentResults wrapper. Errors via DataClientError.
Plan: ship one Builder producing index.html + styles.css with five required IDs, 30 --team-{ABBR} CSS custom properties, responsive grid, dark/light via prefers-color-scheme.
data-client.js (5 exports + DataClientError) + teams.js (30-team fallback) + metadata.json. All URLs pinned to https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1.
index.html + styles.css + metadata.json. Five required IDs present. 30 --team-* custom properties + AL/NL league colors.
5 assertions pass; S1.A2 deferred to edge-case-testing (live HTTP); S1.A4 deferred to final-sweep Critic (cross-file grep).
7 assertions pass: 5 required IDs present, 30 --team-* properties, zero CDN refs, module script tag.
Plan: pure-function computeWeeklyTrends over Map<teamId, GameResult[]>.
Plan: pure-function computeRankings projecting flat standings into 6 divisions + 2 leagues + 2 wild-card lists.
One pure-function export.
One pure-function export; always 6 division keys.
3 assertions pass; 2 deferred.
4 assertions pass; 1 deferred.
Plan: app.js bootstrap + render glue.
init() + renderRankings + renderTrends + renderUpcoming + showError + retry.
8 assertions pass; 3 live-data deferred to edge-case-testing/CV.
7 source files + manifest.json. Flat structure suitable for GitHub Pages.
Plan: Node static-fidelity + manual test-plan.
run-tests.mjs + report.json + test-plan.md; 46/46 pass.
46/46 static-fidelity assertions pass; 6 live-data assertions deferred to CV.
DAG consistency + writer compliance + contract coverage + OOS drift all clean. Severity 0.
All 7 nodes verified across 5 waves. Artifact at output/integration/. Ready for final-sweep Critic + CV.

All 9 final-sweep checks pass. Writer-permission compliance, OOS-keyword scan (no stripe/paypal/fantasy/draft/ticket/auth/signup/push/sw/backend/wager/sportsbook/logo/i18n hits; 2 'bootstrap' word-sense hits are program-init comments, not the CSS framework), schema conformance (ledger v1, sections v1, review v1, build-complete, manifest), section coverage (all 6 sections verified), charter-implementation conformance (all 11 IP machine-checkable assertions verified including live IP6.M1/IP4.M1 runs via Node + structural checks on data-client/app.js/index.html/styles.css), Sev-0 audit (empty dir, clean), acceptance-assertion coverage (every section phrase bound, PNV.1 + 7 FCs bound), prose coverage (44 DCAs sampled, graph closed), inline-deviation audit (empty dir, clean). No flags at medium or higher. One INFO-level non-flag observation: integrator's manifest.json co-locates with the served deliverable — no functional impact. Verdict: clean. Next: ConvergenceVerifier.

Verdict: pass. Option A production fidelity (Playwright Chromium + live statsapi.mlb.com). All 7 FC requirements pass (FC.6 pass_pending_deploy — URL pattern verified, live probe deferred to Orchestrator). PNV.1 pass: real browser rendered 6 division standings + 30 trend rows + 105 upcoming games (MAY 26 through JUN 2) with no console errors. Error-path (banner shows on data-client failure) and empty-state path (no-games copy) both confirmed via stubbed routes. All 30 MLB teams represented. 2 concerns recorded: (1) Arizona renders as both AZ (standings/trends, from API) and ARI (upcoming, from teams.js metadata) — cosmetic inconsistency, not Sev 0 trivial; (2) live URL probe deferred per briefing. CV picked up all 6 assertions deferred by edge-case-testing (PNV.1, S1.A2, S5.A2-A4, DCA.FC.7) and all pass. No Sev 0 fixes applied. next_role=Orchestrator.

rev-1 user-requested feature extension: merged mlb-trends-dashboard.html widgets into the live daily dashboard as a Trends tab. Added stats-client.js (fetches /teams/stats?group=hitting|pitching + 14-day schedule) and trends-charts.js (7 widgets: KPI strip, sortable standings, last-10 leaderboard, RS/RA bubble scatter, OPS/ERA scatter, home/road bars, power/discipline scatter, 14-day W/L heatmap). app.js gained tab routing + lazy Chart.js load. styles.css gained namespaced .trends-* + .tab-button styles. Daily tab behavior unchanged. Chart.js 4.4.0 loaded lazily on first Trends activation. Deployed via direct git commit-push as commit-step.bat equivalent.

rev-2 user-requested visual upgrade: integrated MLB CDN team logos across Daily + Trends tabs (9+ surfaces — rankings rows, sparkline rows, upcoming-game chips, KPI cards primary logo, standings table cap logo, last-10 leaderboard, RS/RA + OPS/ERA + Power/Discipline scatter point markers via Chart.js dataset.pointStyle = HTMLImageElement, home/road logo strip beneath chart, 14-day heatmap rows). New logo-helpers.js module owns the preload + cached HTMLImageElement supply with a per-(id,variant) Map; preloadLogos fires from app.js init() and from initTrendsView(), with the scatter charts re-rendered once images settle. teams.js adds getLogoUrl(id, variant) and refreshes primaryColor for ARI (#A71930 -> #AA182C Sedona Red), DET (#0C2340 -> #0C2C56), NYY (#003087 -> #132448) plus 4 secondary-color refinements (ARI/BOS/CLE/NYY), each citing the rev-2 logo extraction in a `// source:` comment. Matching CSS custom properties (--team-ARI/DET/NYY) updated in styles.css. All 30 MLB CDN logo URLs verified 200 OK; CORS Allow-Origin: *. node --check pass for app.js, teams.js, trends-charts.js, logo-helpers.js, stats-client.js, data-client.js. Deployed via direct git commit-push on main.
